_meta.description: Staylocalx Instagram publisher registry. Read by N8N Code Job Builder on every Telegram command.
_meta.structure_docs: Each key is a Telegram command. Two forms supported: (A) Simple — shared caption/images across all targets. (B) Localized — each target has its own caption/images. The Code Job Builder reads `target.caption || content.caption` and `target.images || content.images`.

/publish_tut01_en.caption:
Onboard your property in under 5 minutes. ⚡

Step-by-step: from zero to a live digital guide your guests can scan with their phone camera.

What's inside this carousel ⤵️

• Sign up & confirm your email
• Pick your role (Owner)
• Add your first property
• Name, location, photos, guest capacity
• You're live — ready for Tutorial 02

Save this for when you're ready to set up. Comment ASK if anything's unclear and I'll walk you through it. 👇

Tutorial 02 is dropping next — we'll customize your guide so guests actually use it.

#vacationrental #airbnbhost #shorttermrental #hostlife #staylocalx #passiveincome #propertyowner #vacationrentalowner #airbnbtips #hosttips

targets.name: @thestaylocalx
targets.caption:
We're live. 🚀

After months of building, Staylocalx is now available for property owners worldwide.

Here's the simple version:

• You have a vacation rental, villa, or short-term let
• Your guests always ask "where should we eat tonight?"
• Right now, those recommendations earn you nothing

Staylocalx fixes that. ⚡

You get a free digital guide your guests scan with their phone camera — no app to download, no friction. Local restaurants, activities, and services pay you a commission every time your guest actually visits (GPS-verified, so you only get paid for real foot traffic).

The split: 70% stays with you. Always.
Average potential: up to €500/mo in additional passive income.
Setup time: 5 minutes.

Tutorial 01 is live on this account if you want to see exactly how to onboard your first property.

If you've ever thought "I should be getting paid for these recommendations" — this is for you. 👇

Link in bio. Free to start.

#vacationrental #airbnbhost #shorttermrental #hostlife #vacationrentalowner #passiveincome #propertyowner #airbnbtips #hosttips #staylocalx #welive #launch

targets.name: @staylocalx.es
targets.caption:
Por fin estamos aquí. 🚀

Después de meses construyendo, Staylocalx ya está disponible para propietarios en todo el mundo.

La idea es sencilla:

• Tienes un apartamento turístico, villa o alquiler vacacional
• Tus huéspedes siempre preguntan "¿dónde podemos cenar esta noche?"
• Ahora mismo, esas recomendaciones no te generan nada

Staylocalx lo arregla. ⚡

Recibes una guía digital gratuita que tus huéspedes abren con la cámara del móvil — sin descargar ninguna app, sin fricción. Los restaurantes, actividades y servicios locales te pagan una comisión cada vez que tu huésped realmente los visita (verificación por GPS, así que solo cobras visitas reales).

Reparto: 70% se queda contigo. Siempre.
Potencial: hasta €500/mes de ingresos pasivos extra.
Tiempo de configuración: 5 minutos.

Si alguna vez has pensado "debería estar cobrando por estas recomendaciones" — esto es para ti. 👇

Enlace en bio. Empezar es gratis.

#alquilervacacional #propietarios #airbnbespaña #turismorural #anfitrion #ingresosextra #alquilerturistico #staylocalx #lanzamiento
